content.answer:
Hi Ian,

discussed with Shuning again; please see the justification below:

   - The candidate is a fresh graduate joining as Associate, aligned with
   TWCB hiring focus.
   - TWCB provides a strong foundation for BAU skills and includes a market
   growth function to evaluate fresh graduate potential.
   - If he performs well, we may consider transferring him to SIP special
   projects or Commercial BI team after 1 to 2 years.

TWCB Scope Includes:

   - Day-to-Day Operations: Monitor TWCB performance, analyze data,
   evaluate policies, drive efficiency, and coordinate with stakeholders to
   manage seller operations and the end-to-end logistics journey.
   - Market Growth Strategy: Drive topline growth, optimize P&L, and
   streamline processes.

let me know if you have any questions, thank you.

*Emily Lin, 林佑容*
Shopee | People Team

Hi Ian,

discussed with Shuning again, would like to propose assigning this fresh
graduate - (Gaspar Ching Loi Min, Interview grade A; SMU, First Class) to
Faye’s team (Commercial BI, FP&A) with the following scope:

*Commercial BI (FP&A) scope Includes*:

   - Develop and maintain financial models to conduct financials budgeting
   and forecasting weekly and monthly
   - Monitor and analyze performance by comparing actuals versus budget,
   and evaluate data month-over-month, quarter-over-quarter, and
   year-over-year to ensure integrity and accuracy
   - Conduct ad-hoc studies to support strategic decisions and ensure
   compliance with financial regulations.

for TWCB, we plan to allocate internal team member to support the function

Moving forward, if there is any attrition in TWCB, we will be more cautious
with backfill decisions and ensure closer alignment on the job scope.

let me know if you have any questions, thank you.

*Emily Lin, 林佑容*
Shopee | People Team
